Store.Prompt.History: 這是 AI 與使用者的歷史聊天總結，作為前情提要：{content}
Store.Prompt.Summarize: Use the language used by the user (e.g. en-us for english conversation, zh-hant for chinese conversation, etc.) to summarise the conversation in at most 200 words. The summary will be used as prompt for you to continue the conversation in the future.
Store.Prompt.Topic: Use the language used by the user (e.g. en for english conversation, zh-hant for chinese conversation, etc.) to generate a title (at most 6 words) summarizing our conversation without any lead-in, quotation marks, preamble like 'Title:', direct text copies, single-word replies, quotation marks, translations, or brackets. Remove enclosing quotation marks. The title should make third-party grasp the essence of the conversation in first sight.
